dashboard.title: 01_otel — FastAPI HTTP Metrics
dashboard.description: Vanilla OTel: HTTP-level metrics from FastAPI auto-instrumentation. No LLM-specific metrics in this experiment.

panels.title: Request Rate (req/s)
panels.description: Number of HTTP requests per second, grouped by endpoint. Shows traffic volume and which endpoints are hot.

panels.title: Request Duration p95 (ms)
panels.description: 95th percentile latency per endpoint. Answers: how long do users wait in the worst case?

panels.title: Request Duration p50 (ms)
panels.description: Median latency per endpoint. Answers: what's the typical user experience?

panels.title: Error Rate (5xx)
panels.description: Rate of 5xx responses per endpoint. Non-zero means the app is failing for some users.

panels.title: Active Requests
panels.description: Number of in-flight concurrent requests. High values indicate saturation or slow downstream dependencies.

panels.title: Response Size (bytes, avg)
panels.description: Average response payload size per endpoint. Large responses on /ask indicate verbose LLM output.
